title: Berglander Gold Dish Drying Rack Over The Sink, L17.5*W 15" Rollable Tianium Golden Plating Stainless Steel Dish Rack with Removable Storage Basket, Perfect for Kitchen Sink
features: STAINLESS STEEL DISH RACK: This Drying Rack for Kitchen counter is made of food grade stainless steel and BPA free food safe silicone and ABS plastic material to protect the sink countertop from scratches.

Foldable Dish Rack: This over-sink clothes rack with rolling design can be folded and rolled up for storage, practical and convenient, easy to clean. It can be quickly put into a drawer or locker when not in use.
NON SLIP SILICONE DRYING MAT: It is fixed by silicone, composed of 18 stainless steel pipes, which can be placed flat on the sink without sliding and bending.
Removable storage basket: The kitchen sink drying rack is also equipped with a removable storage basket, which can store cutlery, chopsticks, spoons and other tableware in the storage basket.

SUPER SPACE-SAVING KITCHEN DRYING RACK: This small utensil drying rack can easily save your kitchen counter space. The best RV kitchen accessories for small countertops and travel trailers must have accessories.
description: Berglander Dish Drying Rack Over the Sink, L17.5"*W 14.9" Rollable Stainless Steel Dish Rack with Removable Storage Basket, Perfect for Kitchen Sink.（Gold）
